title: Ennis, Clare — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ennis, Clare: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ennis is a city in Clare with a population of 26,000. A charming market town in County Clare, known for its traditional Irish music scene, medieval streets, and proximity to the Cliffs of Moher and the Burren.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
